Form NT 10-Q (12b-25)

Notification of Inability to Timely File a Form 10-Q.

Part III - Narrative

The Company is unable to file its quarterly report on Form 10-Q within the prescribed time period due to the recent transition of its Chief Financial Officer and the ongoing migration to a new ERP system. The departure of the prior CFO required additional time for the new finance team to complete its review of the quarterly financial statements. The Company expects to file the report within the five-day grace period.
